2026-03-20T10:20:22.8680325Z Based on my comprehensive investigation:
2026-03-20T10:20:22.8681266Z 
2026-03-20T10:20:24.0918502Z 1. **Current HEAD** (`eebdab7ceb3e81afae6f03190102e9d9f35f355b`) and the last 100+ commits on `main` all show **0 GitHub Check Runs** — the CI does not report via the GitHub Checks API for direct pushes to main.
2026-03-20T10:20:24.0919297Z 
2026-03-20T10:20:25.3609146Z 2. The CI uses **Azure Pipelines** (reporting via GitHub Commit Statuses), and these do not expose per-job check runs in the Checks API endpoint queried by this workflow.
